assertions.expectation: Checks for deprecated API usage that may have changed behavior in 1.30
assertions.reason: Response mentions checking deprecated APIs but refers to 1.31→1.32 upgrade and behavioral changes, not specifically 1.30

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking admission webhooks — they may be rejecting or slowing down requests on the new version
assertions.reason: Includes dedicated section on admission webhook compatibility issues with specific commands and troubleshooting steps

assertions.expectation: Advises checking if resource requests/limits need adjusting for any system components that changed
assertions.reason: Addresses resource pressure and mentions new versions may have different resource requirements for system components

assertions.expectation: Suggests examining kube-system pods for any that are crashlooping or restarting
assertions.reason: Includes specific commands to check kube-system pods health and status

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check API server metrics and latency (kubectl get --raw /metrics)
assertions.reason: Provides kubectl get --raw /metrics commands for checking deprecated API calls and webhook duration

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking if NetworkPolicy or service mesh components need updating for the new version
assertions.reason: Includes service mesh check section with Istio/ASM verification commands and mentions upgrading service mesh operators

assertions.expectation: Advises reviewing pod events for scheduling delays or readiness probe failures
assertions.reason: Includes multiple kubectl get events commands to check for various types of events and issues

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking if HPA or VPA are behaving differently on the new version
assertions.reason: Dedicated section on HPA/VPA behavioral changes with specific commands and mentions changed scaling behavior in 1.32
